command: VAEVAS_EVAS_PERSISTENT_WORKER=0 VAEVAS_DEFAULT_EVAS_ENGINE=evas EVAS_ENGINE=evas python3 benchmark-vabench-release-v2/scripts/run_gold_spectre_mini_cert.py --spectre-backend none --evas-engine evas --timeout-s 900 --task-id vbr1_l1_window_comparator_detector:tb --task-id vbr1_l1_aperture_delay_track_and_hold:dut --task-id vbr1_l1_first_order_lowpass:bugfix --task-id vbr1_l2_weighted_sar_adc_dac_loop:e2e --task-id vbr1_l2_gain_extraction_convergence_measurement_flow:e2e --output-root /private/tmp/issue20_five_evas_only_cert

rows.notes: completed_conversions=124 unique_codes=60 code_range=0..254 sample_span=0.900 vout_span=0.896 avg_quant_err=0.0018 max_quant_err=0.0035 avg_dac_err=0.0032 max_dac_err=0.0565 avg_roundtrip_err=0.0049 monotonic_reversals=0

fix_summary: SAR release checker now evaluates completed conversion rows via conv_done and vin_sample instead of every clock edge.
run_gold_spectre_mini_cert.py now accepts --spectre-backend none as a clean EVAS-only mode.
run_gold_spectre_mini_cert.py now accepts --evas-engine to make Docker Python-EVAS runs explicit.
